assumption: R_HI is measured residual-blind and not selected from endpoint residuals.
A fixed transition rule maps R_HI and disk scale to R_tail_in and R_tail_cut.
The mapped cutoff constrains the same outer-disk/tail support class used by F_tail.
A source-native component decomposition identifies a compact component.
A compact support radius or bound is available before endpoint scoring.
Reff is not used as compact support unless a support theorem justifies the map.
The source identifies vertical structure rather than only projection or inclination.
A measured or bounded h/Rs, flare, warp, or gas-plane thickness parameter is supplied.
Projection effects are not promoted to vertical kernel parameters without a theorem.
